name: ngx-brand-voice
description: Guía completa de voz de marca NGX "Verdad Directa" con modos de comunicación, adaptación por audiencia y ejemplos aprobados
capabilities: Provides complete NGX brand voice guidelines and communication modes
Offers audience-specific adaptation strategies for age groups 30-45 and 45-60
Includes approved examples for different communication contexts
Contains validation checklist for pre-publication content review
Delivers agent-specific voice personalities for consistent messaging
author: 270aldo
securitySummary: This skill is a documentation-only resource providing brand voice guidelines. All static findings are false positives. The detected URL is metadata pointing to the skill source. The detected backticks in SKILL.md are markdown formatting for file names, not executable code. No actual code execution, network access, or security risks present.
valueStatement: Maintaining consistent brand voice across content is challenging without clear guidelines. This skill provides comprehensive NGX brand voice documentation to ensure all content aligns with approved communication standards.
limitations: Content guidelines are specific to NGX brand and may not apply to other brands
Documentation is primarily in Spanish language
Requires human judgment to apply guidelines to specific content scenarios
Does not automatically generate content, only provides reference guidelines

useCases.title: Marketing Copy Creation
useCases.description: Marketing teams use the skill to write campaign copy that aligns with NGX brand voice across different communication modes and target audiences.

useCases.targetUser: Content editors and quality assurance teams
useCases.title: Content Quality Assurance
useCases.description: Content reviewers validate existing copy against brand guidelines using the provided checklist to ensure consistency before publication.

useCases.title: Audience-Specific Messaging
useCases.description: Communication specialists adapt messaging for different age segments using documented audience adaptation strategies and examples.

promptTemplates.title: Validate Existing Copy
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this copy against NGX brand voice guidelines and identify any elements that need adjustment to match the Verdad Directa voice
promptTemplates.scenario: Quality assurance check before publishing content

promptTemplates.title: Generate Age-Adapted Content
promptTemplates.prompt: Create copy for this product targeting the 45-60 age segment using NGX brand voice Mode B with appropriate adaptation
promptTemplates.scenario: Writing targeted marketing content for specific demographics

promptTemplates.title: Apply Conversion Formula
promptTemplates.prompt: Write conversion-focused copy using the CONFRONTA-FUNDAMENTA-RESUELVE formula for this service offering
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating sales or landing page copy

promptTemplates.title: Multi-Mode Content Variations
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate three versions of this message using NGX communication Modes A, B, and C to test which resonates best with our audience

bestPractices: Always identify target audience age segment before writing to apply appropriate adaptation strategies
Select communication mode based on context: Mode A for education, Mode B for relationship building, Mode C for conversion
Use the validation checklist before finalizing any content to ensure complete brand alignment
antiPatterns: Do not use tentative or uncertain language that contradicts the Verdad Directa voice principle
Avoid applying guidelines mechanically without considering specific context and audience needs
Never skip the validation checklist step, as inconsistent brand voice damages credibility

faq.question: What is the Verdad Directa voice principle?
faq.answer: Verdad Directa is the core NGX brand voice that emphasizes honest, direct communication without ambiguity or unnecessary qualifiers. It builds trust through clarity and concrete statements rather than vague promises.

faq.question: When should I use Mode A versus Mode B or Mode C?
faq.answer: Use Mode A for educational content, Mode B for relationship-building and ongoing communication, and Mode C for conversion-focused messaging like sales pages or calls to action. Each mode maintains Verdad Directa while adjusting tone for context.

faq.question: How do I adapt content for different age segments?
faq.answer: The skill provides specific adaptation strategies for 30-45 and 45-60 age groups. Younger audiences respond to innovation and efficiency, while older segments value proven results and risk mitigation. Reference the audience adaptation documentation for detailed guidelines.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for brands other than NGX?
faq.answer: This skill contains NGX-specific brand guidelines and examples. While the communication principles may be instructive, the content is tailored to NGX voice and should not be directly applied to other brands without significant adaptation.

faq.question: What is the CONFRONTA-FUNDAMENTA-RESUELVE formula?
faq.answer: This is a conversion copywriting structure: CONFRONTA presents the problem directly, FUNDAMENTA provides evidence or proof, and RESUELVE offers the concrete solution. It aligns with Verdad Directa by being transparent about challenges and solutions.

faq.question: Is this skill only for Spanish language content?
faq.answer: Yes, the NGX brand voice guidelines and examples are designed for Spanish language content. The principles could inform content in other languages, but all documentation and examples are in Spanish.
